title: EQ - Changed custom EQ, not saved, reset device, changes are not preset [TO BE VERIFIED]
scenario: Unsaved custom EQ changes persist after device reset instead of reverting to saved preset values
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Select a custom EQ preset and modify some frequency bands (do not tap Save).
Press and hold the Power button on the device to reset it.
Wait for the device to power back on and reconnect to the app.
Return to Poly Studio Mobile → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
expected: The unsaved EQ changes should be discarded, and the previously saved preset values should be restored.
